'''âw-j-y''' ('''kawajay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monocoat|monocoat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-j-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monocoat|monocoat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-j-y
|-
! Lemma
| kawajay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwajay|thiwajay]] || [[word:jiwajay|jiwajay]] || [[word:shiwajay|shiwajay]] || [[word:kiwajay|kiwajay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwajay|thuthuwajay]] || [[word:jujuwajay|jujuwajay]] || [[word:shushuwajay|shushuwajay]] || [[word:kukuwajay|kukuwajay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwajay|thuwajay]] || [[word:juwajay|juwajay]] || [[word:shuwajay|shuwajay]] || [[word:kuwajay|kuwajay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwajay|thuwajay]] || [[word:juwajay|juwajay]] || [[word:shuwajay|shuwajay]] || [[word:kuwajay|kuwajay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewajay|thewajay]] || [[word:jewajay|jewajay]] || [[word:shewajay|shewajay]] || [[word:kewajay|kewajay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowajay|thothowajay]] || [[word:jojowajay|jojowajay]] || [[word:shoshowajay|shoshowajay]] || [[word:kokowajay|kokowajay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowajay|thowajay]] || [[word:jowajay|jowajay]] || [[word:showajay|showajay]] || [[word:kowajay|kowajay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowajay|thowajay]] || [[word:jowajay|jowajay]] || [[word:showajay|showajay]] || [[word:kowajay|kowajay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwajay|thĂŠwajay]] || [[word:jĂŠwajay|jĂŠwajay]] || [[word:shĂŠwajay|shĂŠwajay]] || [[word:kĂŠwajay|kĂŠwajay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawajay|thathawajay]] || [[word:jajawajay|jajawajay]] || [[word:shashawajay|shashawajay]] || [[word:kakawajay|kakawajay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawajay|thawajay]] || [[word:jawajay|jawajay]] || [[word:shawajay|shawajay]] || [[word:kawajay|kawajay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawajay|thawajay]] || [[word:jawajay|jawajay]] || [[word:shawajay|shawajay]] || [[word:kawajay|kawajay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawajay|shawajay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawajay|goshawajay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawajay|gokishawajay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawajaynĂŒ|shawajaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawajaynknĂŒ|goshawajaynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawajaynĂŒ|gokishawajaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawajayshĂ«|shawajayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawajaynkshĂ«|goshawajaynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawajayshĂ«|gokishawajayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawajayro|shawajayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawajaynkro|goshawajaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawajayro|gokishawajayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawajaymu|shawajaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawajaynkmu|goshawajaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawajaymu|gokishawajaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawajaysher|shawajaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawajaynksher|goshawajaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawajaysher|gokishawajaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawajayng|shawajayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawajaynkng|goshawajaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawajayng|gokishawajayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawajaya|shawajaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawajaynkya|goshawajaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawajaya|gokishawajaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawajayam|shawajayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawajaynkyam|goshawajaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawajayam|gokishawajayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawajaynĂŒshĂ«|shawajaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawajaynknĂŒshĂ«|goshawajaynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawajaynĂŒshĂ«|gokishawajaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawajaynĂŒro|shawajaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawajaynknĂŒro|goshawajaynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawajaynĂŒro|gokishawajaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawajaynĂŒmu|shawajaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawajaynknĂŒmu|goshawajaynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawajaynĂŒmu|gokishawajaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawajayshĂ«nĂŒ|shawajayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawajaynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawajaynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawajayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawajayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawajayshĂ«ro|shawajayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawajaynkshĂ«ro|goshawajaynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawajayshĂ«ro|gokishawajayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawajayshĂ«mu|shawajayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawajaynkshĂ«mu|goshawajaynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawajayshĂ«mu|gokishawajayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawajayronĂŒ|shawajayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawajaynkronĂŒ|goshawajaynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawajayronĂŒ|gokishawajayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawajayroshĂ«|shawajayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawajaynkroshĂ«|goshawajaynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawajayroshĂ«|gokishawajayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawajayromu|shawajayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawajaynkromu|goshawajaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawajayromu|gokishawajayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawajaymunĂŒ|shawajaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawajaynkmunĂŒ|goshawajaynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawajaymunĂŒ|gokishawajaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawajaymushĂ«|shawajaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawajaynkmushĂ«|goshawajaynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawajaymushĂ«|gokishawajaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawajaymuro|shawajaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawajaynkmuro|goshawajaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawajaymuro|gokishawajaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
